{{Expand}}

{{Infobox artifact
| name = Ragnarus mask
| introduced = House of Blades
}}

== House of Blades ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">2</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|The [[Ragnarus mask]] allows the wearer to pull power from [[Naraka]].<ref name="tg-01-house-of-blades-c20">''House of Blades'', chapter 20</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|The [[Ragnarus mask]] ages the wearer to death within a few hours.<ref name="tg-01-house-of-blades-c20" />}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Traveler's Gate nav}}

[[Category:Artifacts]]
[[Category:House of Blades]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate artifacts]]
